description: This is the origin source code with senior setup by LEO.
personal_intro: Hi everyone, I'm Tam (LEO). I'm a web developer passionate about building clean, high-performance, and aesthetic digital experiences. This source code is my 'signature' for a standard project.

features.speed_desc: Using Vite 7 and React 19 to optimize load time and built fastest.
features.structure_desc: Divided by Features logic, easy to maintain and scale for large teams.
features.realtime_desc: Integrated Socket.io connecting directly to Python FastAPI Backend.
features.senior_desc: Using Shadcn UI & Framer Motion for the smoothest experience.

leo_standard.title: The LEO Standard
leo_standard.description: Every line of code in this system is strictly audited: No trash code, no redundant re-renders, no messy logic. This is not just a boilerplate, it's how a Senior sets up the game.
items: Server State management with TanStack Query
Strict Form Validation with Hook Form + Zod
leo_standard.quote: Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it’s bad.
